name: context version
description: Version of the template context contract used by the engine.
behaviour: Scalar string available to every template so template packs can target a stable API.

name: generated at
description: Timestamp when the generation context was created.
behaviour: Scalar ISO timestamp useful for banners, audit comments, and generated file metadata.

name: generator name
description: Name of the generator/runtime package.
behaviour: Scalar string for generated headers or diagnostics.

name: generator version
description: Version of the installed generator/runtime.
behaviour: Scalar string for generated headers, lockfiles, or compatibility checks.

name: project root directory
description: Root directory where generation is running.
behaviour: Path string; should be normalized by the engine.

name: config directory
description: Directory containing user-owned entity configs.
behaviour: Path string; useful for diagnostics and relative resolution.

name: source path
description: Relative path of the config file, for example app.ts or auth/user.ts.
behaviour: Scalar value discovered from the loaded module.

name: source absolute path
description: Absolute file path of the loaded config file.
behaviour: Scalar value mostly for diagnostics; templates may avoid emitting it.

name: source key
description: Discovered entity key from module discovery.
behaviour: Scalar lookup key from discovery metadata.

name: source group key
description: Discovered group key when available.
behaviour: Scalar group key from discovery metadata; may be null when not discovered.

name: metadata loaded at
description: Timestamp when the config module was loaded.
behaviour: Diagnostic scalar; useful for context inspection.

name: metadata module path
description: Resolved module path used by the loader.
behaviour: Diagnostic scalar; usually not emitted into generated code.

name: raw root
description: Original loaded object before context normalization.
behaviour: Escape hatch for advanced templates; not recommended for portable templates.

name: entity key
description: Canonical entity key, e.g. app or user.

name: entity group key
description: Canonical group/module namespace for the entity, e.g. platform or auth.
behaviour: Scalar identifier used for folders, modules, and imports.

name: entity base
description: Optional base entity/config reference.
behaviour: Scalar or object from config; null when no base is used.

name: entity raw config
description: Original raw entity config supplied by the user.
behaviour: Escape hatch preserving user intent exactly.

name: entity is virtualized
description: Whether entity context contains lazy/computed variables.

name: entity full key
description: Stable fully-qualified entity identity, usually group_key + key.
behaviour: Computed string for namespacing and registry lookup.

name: entity module key
description: Normalized module key for generated module names.
behaviour: Computed from group_key and entity key.

name: entity context key
description: Unique key for this entity in the template runtime.
behaviour: Computed string for caches, diagnostics, and context inspection.

description: Boolean flag: is typescript.

description: Boolean flag: is handlebars.

name: render entity
description: The current entity context being rendered.
behaviour: Object alias to entity for template rendering.

description: The current template context being rendered.
behaviour: Object alias to template for template-aware templates.

name: render output path
description: Current output file path.

name: render output folder
description: Current output folder.

name: render output file name
description: Current output file name.

description: Whether generation is running in dry-run mode.

name: render flag will overwrite
description: Whether target file will overwrite an existing file.

name: render flag exists
description: Whether target file already exists.

name: diagnostic warnings
description: Warnings generated while building context.

name: diagnostic errors
description: Errors generated while building context.
behaviour: Array or boolean diagnostic value for inspection/validation.

name: has warnings
description: Whether context has warnings.
behaviour: Array or boolean diagnostic value for inspection/validation.

name: has errors
description: Whether context has errors.

name: unresolved relations diagnostics
description: Unresolved relation details, including errors like constructor resolution failure.

name: used template variables
description: Variables detected in a template during validation.
behaviour: Array or boolean diagnostic value for inspection/validation.

name: unknown template variables
description: Variables used by template but not promised by context contract.
behaviour: Array or boolean diagnostic value for inspection/validation.

description: All entity contexts loaded for a generation run.

description: Loop-safe group buckets containing entities.

description: Number of loaded entity contexts.

description: All groups discovered from entity configs.

description: Number of groups.

description: Current group key inside group loops.
